title: PHUN Stock Earnings: Phunware Misses EPS, Misses Revenue for Q4 2023
text: PHUN Stock Earnings Summary for Q4 2023. Key Results: Phunware significantly underperformed expectations in Q4 2023. The company reported earnings per share of -$17.42, which fell well short of the analyst estimate of -$2.00. Revenue figures were equally disappointing at $939,000, representing a 55.29% worse performance compared to the projected $2.10 million. The large EPS miss was primarily driven by a $25.8 million goodwill impairment charge taken in Q4 2023. Even excluding this non-cash charge, the company's operational results reflected challenges. The revenue miss indicated slower-than-expected conversion of bookings to actual revenue, a persistent issue the company has been working to address.
